sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available in sources

special_mechanics.name: Magic Carpet Riding
special_mechanics.description: Self-scrolling stages where player rides magic carpet through obstacles, including Cave of Wonders escape (vertical movement to avoid lava) and bonus flight stage with Jasmine (free-flying between stages 5-6)

special_mechanics.name: Jump Attack
special_mechanics.description: Primary method to defeat enemies - Aladdin jumps on foes to defeat them

special_mechanics.name: Apple Throwing
special_mechanics.description: Secondary attack method to disorient enemies by throwing apples

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/qualitative data only. No specific physics parameters documented in available sources. Game praised by Nintendo Power for 'superior play control' but exact movement mechanics not quantified. Designed by Shinji Mikami. Sources contain only level design, gameplay mechanics description, and reception data - no ROM values, hex addresses with movement data, or precise physics measurements.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Disney's Aladdin (SNES)
